title: GCS - Integrated Engineering, Design & Project Development | El Salvador
description: GCS is an integrated engineering, design, and project development company in El Salvador, managing projects from concept to delivery with a $37.72M portfolio.

hero.title: Grupo Integral de Construcciones y Servicios
hero.subtitle: Integrated engineering, design, and project development from concept to delivery.

about.title: Integrated Project Development
about.description: GCS is an integrated engineering, design, and project development company specializing in managing the entire process — from conceptual planning to construction delivery. We ensure that every project meets the strict requirements of OPAMSS and other national regulatory bodies, providing technical precision and full legal compliance.
about.portfolioDesc: Over 19,000 m² (≈ 27.6 manzanas) under development, representing a total investment of $37.72 million USD.
about.visionDesc1: With $37.72 million in projects under development, we are positioned to become leaders in the construction sector in El Salvador. Our specialization in low non-native EMF electrical systems, commitment to low plastic usage, and the use of eco-friendly paints sets us apart in the market.
about.visionDesc2: We also work with customers to create healthier homes without compromising on quality. This includes features like Low Non-Native EMF electrical systems, minimal use of plastic/petroleum materials in construction, and paint that is latex-free, zero VOC, and won't flake microplastics.
about.visionDesc3: Additionally, we have a fleet of heavy machinery and work trucks available for rent, complementing our services and offering comprehensive solutions for any construction need.
about.visionDesc4: We will soon open investment opportunities to expand our operations and consolidate our position in the region.

services.title: Engineering, Design & Management
services.description: GCS combines advanced BIM modeling and engineering analysis to deliver accurate, efficient, and sustainable design solutions.
services.section1Desc: GCS handles all pre-construction documentation and institutional coordination to secure approvals quickly and correctly.
services.service1_1: OPAMSS Pre-Procedures: Site Qualification, Construction Line, Stormwater Feasibility.
services.service1_2: Studies / Institutions: Hydrological Study, Soil Study, Municipal Councils, Topography – CNR Cadastre.
services.section2Desc: From initial concepts to final blueprints, we deliver precision and innovation.
services.service2_1_desc: Land Survey, Architectural Design, Hydrological Studies, BIM Modeling, Work Budget.
services.service2_2_desc: Structural Plans, Hydraulic Plans, Soil Study.

projects.title: $37.72M in Development
projects.description: Large-scale construction projects that transform communities.

projects.project2Desc: Luxury apartment complex in San Salvador.
projects.project3Desc: A state-of-the-art wellness and fitness complex in San Diego.
projects.project4Desc: Complete remodeling of a restaurant in the historic center.
projects.project6Desc: Modern apartment building in Santa Tecla.
projects.project7Desc: Exclusive villas focused on well-being in San Diego.
projects.project8Desc: Short and long term rental units in Nuevo Cuscatlan.
projects.project9Desc: A beautiful beach house in Punta Mango.
projects.project10Desc: Luxury cabins at La Posada de los Pájaros.

investment.title: Invest in the Future
investment.description: Explore how you can invest in the future of construction and development with GCS, driving growth and innovation in El Salvador.
investment.benefit3: Unique specialization in low non-native EMF
investment.ctaDescription: Contact us today to learn more about how you can participate in our innovative projects.

contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Project
contact.description: We are ready to turn your ideas into reality.

footer.description: Building the future of El Salvador with innovation and exceptional quality.
